name: Rice Waffles with Fruit Sauce
recipeIngredient: safflower oil or cooking spray -- to coat waffle iron
2 teaspoons date sugar or maple syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat waffle iron and lightly brush with safflower oil.
2. In a medium bowl, combine rice flour, baking powder, nutmeg, cinnamon, and salt. In a separate bowl, combine honey, egg yolks, milk, the 1/4 cup safflower oil, and rice. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Combine dry ingredients with wet ingredients, then fold in egg whites.
3. Preheat oven to 200 degrees F. Cook waffles one at a time, keeping them warm in the oven on a heatproof platter. In a small saucepan, combine strawberries, date sugar (or maple syrup), and arrowroot. Cook over medium-high heat until thick. Let cool slightly, then mix with yogurt.
4. Pour strawberry sauce over warm waffles and serve.
Makes about 8 waffles.
